title: Transcript Facts Output
description: Structured output of the transcript_extraction pass. Contains objective facts extracted from the meeting transcript.

meeting_id.description: Identifier of the meeting whose transcript was processed.

facts.description: Objective facts extracted from the transcript. Each entry is a single extractable statement.

participant_names.description: Names of participants identified in the transcript.

topics_discussed.description: High-level topics covered during the meeting.

duration_minutes.description: Meeting duration in minutes if determinable from the transcript.
